'''鈭歳-g-ch-dh''' ('''karagchedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wedlease|wedlease]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wedlease|wedlease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-g-ch-dh
|-
! Lemma
| karagchedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiragchedhoko|thiragchedhoko]] || [[word:jiragchedhoko|jiragchedhoko]] || [[word:shiragchedhoko|shiragchedhoko]] || [[word:kiragchedhoko|kiragchedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoragchedhoko|thoragchedhoko]] || [[word:joragchedhoko|joragchedhoko]] || [[word:shoragchedhoko|shoragchedhoko]] || [[word:koragchedhoko|koragchedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ragchedhoko|th忙ragchedhoko]] || [[word:j忙ragchedhoko|j忙ragchedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙ragchedhoko|sh忙ragchedhoko]] || [[word:k忙ragchedhoko|k忙ragchedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
